name: The Archfey
description: Your pact grants fey-flavored magic and trickster utility.

name: The Fiend
description: Your pact grants infernal power focused on offense and resilience.

name: The Great Old One
description: Your pact grants alien psychic influence and mind-bending effects.

name: The Hexblade
description: Your pact binds weapon-focused shadow magic to your hemocraft.

name: The Undead
description: Your pact grants deathly magic and fear-based battlefield control.
